reviews.review_description:
This is such a cool little game. It really makes you feel like you're playing boulé! And the 2 areas look so good and make you feel like you're in France!
The weight of the balls is really realistic and the physics works well!
The little robot Rusty who you play against solo offers a decent challenge!
My mum (who is a pensioner) really loves boulé and even she enjoyed this a whole lot when she tried it!
I do wish it had Pass and Play so I could play against her, but the trouble is that the game rules don't work with that very well. Regardless, check this game out! It's a lot of fun!

reviews.review_title: Great experience , love and so realistic
reviews.review_description:
Hello everyone

If you like to play petanque with a typical French enviroment this is the game you gave to play !

The game has 2 maps :  in France on a calm street next to a cafe and in front of the Eiffel tower in Paris.

You can play against Rusty ( the bot ) with four difiiculty levels who are really realistic in every way you want to play.

The realistic level is really really really good and you actually have the impression of a realistic petanque game.

The multiplayer has a small active group on discord with the actual creator of this game
and on the meta quest community 


Conclusion : just buy this game if you really like to play petanque and you wont be dissapointend !!

I have been playing Petanque in real life for 30+ years. I was delighted to find a VR boule game that I can play anytime I want in my own home (no matter the weather). The physics of throwing the boules is very realistic and quick to adapt to. There is an active Boule Petanque community on discord where online multiplayer games are planned and announced. We might not all speak the same language but the common bond is the love of the sport. The developers are very accessible and responding to player feedback with modifications and improvements to the game. I thoroughly recommend Boule Petanque and have already gifted it to several friends.

I really like the physics in this game, it feels great to throw the ball and play. 

However, multiplayer doesn’t seem to work for me. When I go to join or create a multiplayer game it says update app, I can’t seem to resolve this issue. 

Idk if it has something to do with a  new quest update v81, but I wish I could be able to play with my friend. 

Besides that offline match is great, even though every round bot plays the same.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your Review. Please e-mail us at devs@bpvr.eu or join our discord at https://discord.gg/NrnNMh2JNP. We are happy to assist you to get Multiplayer to work. What you can Check is If your friend and you use the newest Version of the Game (three dots besides the Game Icon and use settings)

reviews.review_description: Very easy to join a networked game and play with others. Good game mecanics and gameplay. Fair game for an affordable price. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Can you think about the following optopns

Rusty change volume and sound type

Have a practice range for shooting it pointing.

Few more people would be nice..watching or at the bar


Few more locations ie on the beach..

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind review. The next  update will bring an options menu . You can chance the volume. If you choose the Paris Square you have more life.

reviews.review_title: A hidden gem for chill competitive fun!
reviews.review_description:
This is a fun and easy-going VR game perfect for relaxing hangouts, whether you're playing 1v1, 2v2, or even 3v3. The environments are charming, with a lovely South of France setting—and now Paris has just been added! The physics are spot on, which makes the gameplay feel natural and satisfying.

It’s clear the devs put a lot of thought and care into this title. Originally released in 2021, it’s still being actively updated and polished, which is great to see. There aren’t many pétanque games out there, and this one stands out with its quality and continued support.

If you’re looking for a well-made version of one of France’s most iconic games, this is a great pick!

But this just received a update and messed with player location, before once player throws the ball hits A to move to the side for next person to play then hit A again you would go back at the correct location which was done perfectly. But now going back and forth after hitting A you have  completely reorganized you self. Please fix this great game if is frustrating to play in this condition ￼

developer_response.body:
Update: you can now change that in the new option menu, 

Hello Papa165,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We understand your concerns regarding the recent changes to the teleportation system. The update, which realigns the camera to face the playfield upon entering the ring, was implemented based on requests from several test users who found it improved their gameplay experience.​

We recognize that this change may not suit everyone's preferences. Our goal is to provide a more personalized gaming experience, and we hope to introduce customizable settings in the future. However, as a small indie team, our ability to develop new features depends on the support and feedback from our player community.​

We also want to highlight that the recent update addressed numerous stability issues and introduced a new course, which we offered for free as a token of our appreciation to our dedicated players.​

Your feedback is invaluable to us. If you have any further suggestions or concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out.​ You can also join our Discord channel on https://discord.gg/NrnNMh2JNP to gain access to our beta channel and therefore faster updates that are in active development.

Best regards,

The Boule Petanque Development Team

reviews.review_description: relaxing game:)
Awesome game. Easy to learn and engaging. Environment is serene. Well worth the price of admission

developer_response.body:
Great, we're happy 😀 Feel free to join our Discord to find other players: https://discord.gg/NrnNMh2JNP
Multiplayer is a lot of fun.

reviews.review_description: Growing up in southern France I used to play Pétanque quite often. I find this game to be very true to the real experience, both in its mechanics as well as the atmosphere. Good job to the devs!

you developers in agreement with meta are creating more and more apps where it is mandatory to have the connection open even if you are in singleplayer, even if the app does not require a connection to work, you force players to have the connection open because then meta stores the game data, which is valuable data that he perhaps resells.

this and many other apps that are coming out can be started and run even without an open connection, but you are forced to keep it open, I don't like this drift that the meta platform is taking at all, and I will give you a star every time I find one similar app that requires an open connection to launch the game in single player mode

what you are doing takes away freedom from users, because the day there is no connection or there is a problem with the servers we will have the games on the viewer but without the "premise" of the network we cannot start even for a single player!

p.s. Before the writer I know that you warn in the game sheet that the internet connection is mandatory for this app but the matter does not change! I have been using the Quest since the first model and this change, especially for those who do not have a good connection or live in places where the connection is poor and sometimes absent, is not good at all, especially when the app could work easily without an open connection.

I was really surprised,how addictive this game is.
So far I have done only the tutorial and some single player matches, but I can see myself coming back to it more often. It has a really nice relaxing atmosphere and the game is easy to master.
Definitely recommend it to try it out!

reviews.review_title: Relaxing game that takes me back in time
reviews.review_description:
This game is beautifully done and takes me back to my childhood, playing boule with my grandfather in his garden :) No bugs so far, just one typo I reported via the ingame feedback form.
I found the graphics a bit blurry but Quest Game Optimizer took care of that. It's impressively crisp and stunning now, but if I intend to play for a longer period of time, I might go back to default settings to make the battery last longer.

Quite a fun little game, would love to see more environments, a lobby system for easier multiplayer access and some different songs to make everything a little more lively. The translations (particularly, spanish ones) need a little work too.
Besides that, I didn't expect to enjoy a game like this so much! My friends and I took turns against the bot and we all had a blast 😊

I have never heard of Boule Petanque before, don't even know if I am saying the name right. What I do know, its a fun relaxing VR sport that's addictive and easy to play.

I only got to play single player, against Rusty the bot, but I had a lot of fun. I can just imagine the fun with friends.  The game reminds me of playing marbles as a child. The way you are throwing balls at a smaller ball. 
It is super easy to play, yet can be as challenging as knocking balls in a game of pool at the same time. 

For me the best feature of the game is the ball physics. This made it really immersive and felt like I was actually throwing a ball. You can feel the difference in the ball sizes. You can also feel a perfect weight and throwing mechanic in tossing the ball. From how much force to use, to aiming it at another ball. It all felt great and easy. The balls contacting each other also felt right.

If you are a fan of ForeVR  games, you will want this in your Quest library for sure. 

Watch my preview here,
https://youtu.be/Oyg3-Rijwws

UPDATE: I deleted the old review because everything I complained about was FIXED!  

I increased the stars to 4 stars!  The tutorial is excellent to help you learn how to play if you never have played Bocce Ball before.  They added difficulty levels as well as multiplayer rounds.  Now you can play against the Robot, play 1 vs 1, 2 vs 2, or 3 vs 3.  

This is a really fun, relaxing and challenging game!  EXCELLENT! 

I'd still like to see more action/people in the background as you play.  Possibly old men sitting at a table playing checkers, children playing, or people watching you play who then clap when the game is done and/or when you win a round. 

This game is just ready for the Merta store!

Very relaxing and realistically challenging when playing against the AI. Latest update introduces multiple settings for AI opponent’s skill level and birds that fly around to increase the illusion of presence. Hope the developer will enhance the graphical quality to be more sharp. Easy to establish games with friends or strangers.

Update: https://youtu.be/X7_kFfRIB_w

Finally made Rusty more of a challenge. I no longer can beat Rusty 13-0 in 5 rounds. Rusty actual now seems to be able to have some good throws. I still would love to see other bots and locations. This is a fun game that has great potential for the main store if key features were added. 



https://youtu.be/FsUR9V2iTgs

Updated update- rusty is still too easy, I can easily win in a few rounds 13-0. Rusty will leave so much room making it too easy to score 3 points in a round. I don’t know what happened, but it is no longer fun because there is no challenge… I would pay for more bots and locations. The gameplay is good. 

Update: I like the new physics, but why is rusty so very easy now- I can now win in 5 or 6 rounds 13-0. Since multiplayer is not an option for me (never found a match), rusty use to be able to have a few nice shots once in awhile- now he is not even close. I got my $5 worth, but was hoping for more- give us a harder bot. 




https://youtu.be/EUCRToCYpp8 

The bocce ball game that was part of Sports Champions for ps3 move was much better than this. I only played the bot a few times (easy wins), but this game feels off. I was not able to play the multiplayer mode- couldn’t find an available game. Not upset about taking a chance on a $5 game, but I would love to see more AI opponents (tournament) for the single player. Is there a way to add spin to the ball? I know this isn’t bocce, but I would like to have 4 tries instead of the 3 balls you get per round with this game. 
Will add more stars with more options…

I really enjoy playing this game.  My only criticism is that Rusty is hard to beat.  It took me quite a while, but I finally beat him.  Rusty needs to have various skill levels such as  easy, medium and hard.  Also have you considered developing other games such as cornhole and horseshoes which have similar throwing techniques to bocce.

Me and my friends had a nice time trying out this game. The actual boules play works out wonderfully, the environment is pleasant. There is room for improvment concerning the online playing modes. For this price if you like Boule it is imho a nobrainer.

I've played at least two, but maybe 3 VR Bocce games so far, and this one is the best. You really have to work to throw the balls. Looks like a valid platform for many developments. I would like to see "Urban" maps, like in public parks with trash cans, tables and debris in the play-field. Really happy with the game, and the price-point is great now, so get in early, it's bound to go up if they keep developing this title.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind review. We keep developing the title.

reviews.review_title: Good mechanics, but space for improvemen
reviews.review_description:
The core game mechanics are well done. The play space is really well made and beautiful. I love that 'plaza' from a typical village.
Sounds works great and multiplayer works well but sometimes the game get bugged..
Oculus avatars are a good addition (but I works love to see the new Oculus avatars).
Game is fun to play with a friend. Very challenging and quick.
For improvements:
- Allow free movements as an option.
- when is your turn to throw out your avatar in the throw zone... Because tele transportation to there is a little unnecessary.
- a tutorial on main screen door how to move.
- some animations (leaves falling, birds, bugs) , sky movement.
- sound when the ball his the ground.
- more players !! It's fun with 2 players, bit a party with 4 works be great for chatting and playing.

Good work! Keep it improving , and it will become a good social game

developer_response.body:
Hi ymbepor,
in the 1.1 version we fixed the problems with the multiplayer. Also the game can handle bad internet connections now. We also added the sound when the ball is on the ground.

reviews.review_title: Reminded me of a childhood sport
reviews.review_description: This game is sooo good to kill time with friends. Fun and relaxing too!

Rusty is one sneaky MF on "hard".
;)

Just kidding, almost perfect game. Activating the music player seems a little shaky and one thing badly missing is 1v1 Multiplayer or a possibility in general to compete against other "human" players without being in a VR bubble.
Otherwise - great.

developer_response.body: We removed the Youtube-Player because it made too many problems: Bad performance, buggy sound, etc. Hopefully it's better now.

reviews.review_description: I have played them all and this one is the best, by far. The game doesnt cost much, but it delivers much more. I am excited to see future updates and would pay much more for such a game. With the ”settings tool” you can make this almost real. I am so thankful for this game and will absolutely recommend it to both beginners and pros.

developer_response.body: Thank you, we are speechless and are now just happy about this great review.

reviews.review_description:
It‘s the best petanque simulation (I know 2), I ever played. As I am a petanque coach, first I was frustrated not to win. Then I started with the easiest level - and won. Then I tried the second level - and won again. On level 3 I am still working on my first victory.🙁
- I missed some noises, too.
- it‘s hard to throw the jack. It is too „light“/quick!
- quite often I lost a ball, which fell down - why?

How could I play with others? This I couldn’t manage up to now.

Keep on improving! Even it‘s great!
Karl (Boulecoach)

developer_response.body:
Update: We fixed the issue with the noises!

Hello Karl, great to hear that you like our game. And thanks for your notes on the game. Please tell us which noises you miss. We gonna check the properties of the jack again (speed, weight). You lose the ball when you leave the ring or press another button addtionally to the grab button when you throw. To find other players you can join our Discord server. You can also take the leaderboard and add the players to your friends list. Or if you have a better idea to bring players together for parties you can write us at devs@bpvr.eu or join our discord server as well: https://discord.gg/ZSrNdqDPbf. Multiplayer is so much fun.

reviews.review_description: The mechanics work well and had a lot of fun with this so far - looking forward to seeing what gets added, agree with comments about adding varied difficulty levels, team Vs team, more customisation and an in-built YouTube video player would make this even better.

I bought this game because it’s January and I’m in northern(ish) Europe and it’s cold and dreary. What I need is sunshine and wine and cheese and the scent of lavender in the air. I.e. what I need is summer in the Provence. This game will provide a little bit of that. BYO snacks and light a scented candle :) A bientôt sur la place!
Rusty level is not adjustable. So he wins all the time and at the end it is boring …

developer_response.body: Rusty level is now adjustable. Just download the update.

reviews.review_description: Just played solo against A.I. Rusty. Great fun and although no instructions was easy to follow. As others have said more environments would be welcome, but can't complain for the price. Excellent effort from creators. Thoroughly recommend

I got this game gifted to me so i felt obligued to play it.
It's surprisingly great, even just in singleplayer mode, i loved it.

Looking for regular matches? Add me to your friend list.
The most recent update has corrected Rusty and made the Bot a worthy competitor.  Love the other improvements to the multiplayer selections as well, making it easier to find players. Back to a 5 star game.


It's not unnecessarily complicated. You get into the game and you play...done. I love that the graphics aren't the usual Unity out of the box garbage...the creator really wanted this to be immersive and feel real. 
I would love to see a few more environments and an option to add more opponents, balls, and maybe even team vs team.
This deserves 5 stars, it is what it says it is and isn't trying to fool you - the throw also feels right on.

Its Bocce Ball or similar to it, its polished, it has multiplayer or vs AI options and its not expensive. If your into this kind of sport then I think this is an easy buy.

Video Review: https://youtu.be/puI91aQhFZI

This game is pretty much like Bocce Ball, but it emphasizes lobbing the ball more versus rolling to get close to the object ball. The game concept is simple by nature, but challenging to master. It would be great if the multiplayer options were easier to get someone else to play online. Other environments and the use of a Meta avatar would be cool as well.

developer_response.body: We have Meta avatars in Multiplayer. We are thinking about adding other environments. We tried different options to get people to play Multiplayer but they did not work out (Quickmatch, Invite to a Multiplayer game while playing against Rusty the robot in Single Player). Hope you like our game anyway. It is a lot of work :)

reviews.review_title: Where have the sound effects gone?
reviews.review_description: Fun game, but after a recent update some of the sound effects, like rusty shooting out his balls,  have been removed...why?

developer_response.body: We fixed the issues with the sound effects! Please update :)

reviews.review_description: Perfect for when stuck inside and the weather isn’t playing ball. Looking forward to trying some multiplayer, Rusty is a challenge but need humans
